reviews.comment:
El sabado 8 de mayo llegue a las 7 am a cargar, los empleados no podían vender nafta hasta las 8 ,porq estaba por aumentar y no tenían permiso de hacerlo. Era la única ypf . Las demás me cargaron

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday, May 8th, I arrived at 7 am to fill up my tank. The employees couldn't sell me gas until 8 am because the price was about to go up and they weren't authorized to do so. It was the only YPF station. The others filled my tank.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLNTR5aGJ3EAE
